creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 214384
gh-0.8.0.diff

Amended:
 * Bumped DISTVERSION to 0.8.0 and updated distinfo.
 * Removed 'do-test' target as not explicitly needed,
   and is already covered via the ports go framework.

Changelog:
 * https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/v0.8.0

Tested:
 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 3.3.4).
